next_steps: Perform a percutaneous ultrasound-guided kidney biopsy for histological evaluation
Order serum protein electrophoresis and immunofixation to rule out paraproteinemia
Order autoimmune serologies including ANA, dsDNA, complement levels (C3, C4), and anti-PLA2R antibodies
Initiate 24-hour urine collection for total protein quantification
Initiate supportive therapy with ACE inhibitor or ARB for proteinuria and blood pressure control
Initiate venous thromboembolism prophylaxis given the nephrotic-range proteinuria and hypercoagulable state
